positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for olive_garden_positive_v2.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u56,axiom,
    ~tom_will_rent(X0)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    allows_pets(sK0)).

cnf(u66,axiom,
    ~greater(X0,amount_1500) | greater(X0,amount_1000)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    rent(olive_garden,amount_2000)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    amount_1500 != amount_1000).

cnf(u53,negated_conjecture,
    ~deposit(olive_garden,amount_2000)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    managed_building(olive_garden)).

cnf(u69,axiom,
    ~deposit(X0,X1) | greater(X1,amount_1500) | ~allows_pets(X0)).

cnf(u52,negated_conjecture,
    ~deposit(olive_garden,X0) | ~greater(X0,amount_2000)).

cnf(u45,axiom,
    ~deposit(X0,X1) | X1 = X2 | ~managed_building(X0) | ~rent(X0,X2) | greater(X1,X2)).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    deposit(X0,X1) | ~tom_will_rent(X0)).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    managed_building(sK0)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    amount_2000 != amount_1500).

cnf(u72,axiom,
    ~greater(X0,amount_2000) | greater(X0,amount_1000)).

cnf(u70,axiom,
    greater(amount_2000,amount_1000)).

cnf(u49,axiom,
    ~allows_move_in(X0,fluffy) | tom_will_rent(X0) | ~deposit(X0,X1) | greater(X1,amount_1500)).

cnf(u65,axiom,
    ~greater(X0,amount_2000) | greater(X0,amount_1500)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    amount_2000 != amount_1000).

cnf(u48,axiom,
    allows_move_in(X0,fluffy) | ~tom_will_rent(X0)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~greater(X0,X0)).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    greater(amount_1500,amount_1000)).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    ~greater(X1,X2) | ~greater(X0,X1) | greater(X0,X2)).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    greater(amount_2000,amount_1500)).

cnf(u50,axiom,
    allows_move_in(X0,X1) | ~allows_pets(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define cat(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define pet(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define tom_has_cat(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define deposit_required(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
